title: Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Agenda 12-08-23
body: Agenda Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Friday, December 8, 2023, 9:00 a.m. to 10:00 p.m. Microsoft Teams 9:00 am – 9:05 am: Welcome, introductions, and selecting meeting minutes volunteer Select a meeting minutes volunteer 9:05 am – 9:10 am: Approve meeting minutes for November 9:10 am – 9:15 am: Vanessa update on Annual Report presentation 9:15 am – 9:20 am: Mentor-Mentee Match (Justin, Alissa, Kendra, Liza) Status check-in 9:20 am – 9:40 am.: Events (Vanessa, Carmen, Barney) Review feedback from Kickoff Event Discuss any suggested changes for next year based on the feedback Decide on timing/content/setting of 2-3 more events for Spring 2024 9:40 – 9:45 am: Resources ( Kendra, Peter, Alissa) Status check-in 9:45 am to 10:00 a.m.: Q&A and Open Discussion 10:00 am: Adjourn Next ASMC meeting: January 12, 2024
